creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: genvk.py always had such bogus shebang but stage-qa didn't complain before ports 93b836bc9e65 because it didn't have executable bit set. Adding USES=shebangfix would embed /usr/local/bin/python unless USES=python:build which would use /usr/local/bin/python3.9 which makes no sense for **installed** file without USES=python:run.
